title: 08 grape familiar direct mutation
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Turn the exact gentle hooded jelly creature from Image 1 into a clean turntable and change only its color and hood material. Keep its small triangular body, tiny feet, simple friendly dot-eyed face, proportions, and shy odd charm unchanged. Make its entire body deep grape-violet translucent gummy candy; make the pointed hood and short cape a thinner, translucent peeled-grape gummy layer rather than fuzzy fabric. Show front, three-quarter front, strict side, and back views of the identical character, plus small bowing and swan-dive callouts. Remove only the blue platform and original green/lavender colors. The expression stays gentle, never sly or sinister.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Preserve the attached character's identity and charm. Make only the requested presentation or material change. Clean off-white studio background, consistent soft light, no environment, people, props, packaging, captions, labels, borders, or watermark.
